case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS MELENDEZ, GEORGE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $250.94 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT MELENDEZ, GEORGE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-24-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
